public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as supply marshal.
appearance: Black leather or dark structured armor, controlled insignia, and enforcement-ready kit make legality feel physically present.
manner: Balances command voice with practiced observation, sounding like someone who expects trouble to hide inside normality. In Roaz, that reads as someone precise, disciplined, and legality-first, with little patience for disorder, and the habits of a supply marshal still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of supply marshal in and around House Roaz, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep House Roaz workable through the obligations of supply marshal while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Roaz.
hidden_pressure: Must notice trouble early enough that force remains legitimate rather than merely reactive. Around House Roaz, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of supply marshal visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Any task accepted from Selda Chainwell may turn into an escort, checkpoint, or route-control problem before the destination is reached.
Selda Chainwell needs outside hands to handle a breach, seizure, or violent disturbance before it spreads through House Roaz.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V28_8 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Uniform, posture, and the way others make room mark Selda Chainwell as visible enforcement before rank ever needs to be named.

encounter_context.usual_environment: House Roaz: checkpoints, barracks, patrol seams, or visible trouble-spots
encounter_context.interaction_anchor: threshold control or rapid incident response
